sentences.sentence: The automotive sector is well used to adapting to automation in manufacturing.
sentences.translation: 汽车行业已经非常习惯于适应制造过程中的自动化。

structure.text: The automotive sector
is well used to adapting to automation in manufacturing

difficult_points: be used to doing 表示“习惯于做某事”，to 是介词。
adapting to automation in manufacturing 中 in manufacturing 限定自动化发生在制造领域。
well used to 加强“已经很习惯”的程度。

sentences.sentence: The implementation of robotic car manufacture from the 1970s onwards led to significant cost savings and improvements in the reliability and flexibility of vehicle mass production.
sentences.translation: 从20世纪70年代起，机器人汽车制造的实施带来了显著的成本节约，并提高了车辆大规模生产的可靠性和灵活性。

structure.text: The implementation of robotic car manufacture from the 1970s onwards
led to significant cost savings and improvements in the reliability and flexibility of vehicle mass production

difficult_points: 主语核心是 implementation，后面的 of 短语说明实施的内容。
from the 1970s onwards 表示从20世纪70年代起一直向后延续。
cost savings 和 improvements 并列作 led to 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: A new challenge to vehicle production is now on the horizon and, again, it comes from automation.
sentences.translation: 车辆生产现在又面临一个即将出现的新挑战，而这个挑战同样来自自动化。

structure.text: A new challenge to vehicle production
is now on the horizon
and, again, it comes from automation

difficult_points: on the horizon 是比喻表达，表示某事即将出现。
again 插入后一句，强调这次挑战仍然来自自动化。
it 指前面的 A new challenge。

sentences.sentence: However, this time it is not to do with the manufacturing process, but with the vehicles themselves.
sentences.translation: 然而，这一次它并不关乎制造过程，而是关乎车辆本身。

structure.text: this time
it
is not to do with the manufacturing process, but with the vehicles themselves

difficult_points: However 表示与前文制造自动化形成转折。
not ... but ... 形成对比，说明挑战对象从制造过程转向车辆本身。
to do with 表示“与……有关”。

sentences.sentence: Research projects on vehicle automation are not new.
sentences.translation: 关于车辆自动化的研究项目并不新鲜。

structure.text: Research projects on vehicle automation
are not new

difficult_points: on vehicle automation 后置修饰 Research projects。
not new 承接前文，说明自动驾驶研究有较长历史。

sentences.sentence: Vehicles with limited self-driving capabilities have been around for more than 50 years, resulting in significant contributions towards driver assistance systems.
sentences.translation: 具备有限自动驾驶能力的车辆已经存在了50多年，并由此对驾驶辅助系统作出了重要贡献。

structure.text: Vehicles with limited self-driving capabilities
have been around for more than 50 years
resulting in significant contributions towards driver assistance systems

difficult_points: with limited self-driving capabilities 修饰 Vehicles，说明车辆能力有限。
have been around 表示“已经存在”，用现在完成时强调延续至今。
resulting in ... 是现在分词短语，说明这种长期存在带来的结果。

sentences.sentence: But since Google announced in 2010 that it had been trialling self-driving cars on the streets of California, progress in this field has quickly gathered pace.
sentences.translation: 但自从 Google 在2010年宣布其一直在加州街道上试验自动驾驶汽车以来，这一领域的进展迅速加快。

structure.text: since Google announced in 2010 that it had been trialling self-driving cars on the streets of California
that it had been trialling self-driving cars on the streets of California
progress in this field
has quickly gathered pace

difficult_points: since 引导时间状语从句，说明进展加速的起点。
had been trialling 用过去完成进行时，表示 Google 宣布前已在试验。
gathered pace 是习语，表示进展加快。

sentences.sentence: There are many reasons why technology is advancing so fast.
sentences.translation: 技术发展如此迅速有很多原因。

structure.text: There are many reasons
why technology is advancing so fast

difficult_points: There are 引出存在句，用来开启原因列表。
why 引导定语从句，修饰 reasons。
is advancing 使用现在进行时，强调技术正在快速发展。

sentences.sentence: One frequently cited motive is safety; indeed, research at the UK's Transport Research Laboratory has demonstrated that more than 90 percent of road collisions involve human error as a contributory factor, and it is the primary cause in the vast majority.
sentences.translation: 一个经常被提到的动机是安全；事实上，英国交通研究实验室的研究已经表明，90%以上的道路碰撞涉及人为错误这一促成因素，而且在绝大多数情况下它是主要原因。

structure.text: One frequently cited motive
is safety
research at the UK's Transport Research Laboratory has demonstrated that more than 90 percent of road collisions involve human error as a contributory factor
and it is the primary cause in the vast majority

difficult_points: frequently cited 是过去分词短语，修饰 motive，表示常被引用或提及。
分号后 indeed 引出证据，支持 safety 这一动机。
it 指 human error，the vast majority 省略了 cases 或 collisions。

sentences.sentence: Automation may help to reduce the incidence of this.
sentences.translation: 自动化可能有助于减少这种情况的发生率。

structure.text: Automation
may help to reduce the incidence of this

difficult_points: may 表示可能性，作者没有绝对断言。
this 指前文由人为错误导致的道路碰撞。
incidence 表示发生率，而不是事件本身。

sentences.sentence: Another aim is to free the time people spend driving for other purposes.
sentences.translation: 另一个目标是把人们花在驾驶上的时间释放出来，用于其他目的。

structure.text: Another aim
is to free the time people spend driving for other purposes
people spend driving

difficult_points: to free ... 是不定式作表语，说明 aim 的具体内容。
people spend driving 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 the time。
for other purposes 表示被释放出来的时间可以用于其他用途。

sentences.sentence: If the vehicle can do some or all of the driving, it may be possible to be productive, to socialise or simply to relax while automation systems have responsibility for safe control of the vehicle.
sentences.translation: 如果车辆能够承担部分或全部驾驶，人们就可能在自动化系统负责安全控制车辆时，提高效率、社交，或者只是放松。

structure.text: If the vehicle can do some or all of the driving
it may be possible
to be productive, to socialise or simply to relax
while automation systems have responsibility for safe control of the vehicle

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，说明自动驾驶释放人的前提。
it may be possible 中 it 是形式主语，真正内容是三个并列不定式。
while 引导时间状语从句，说明人在做其他事时系统负责安全控制。

expressions.text: do some or all of the driving

sentences.sentence: If the vehicle can do the driving, those who are challenged by existing mobility models – such as older or disabled travellers – may be able to enjoy significantly greater travel autonomy.
sentences.translation: 如果车辆能够完成驾驶，那些受到现有出行模式限制的人——例如老年或残障旅客——或许能够享有显著更大的出行自主权。

structure.text: If the vehicle can do the driving
those who are challenged by existing mobility models – such as older or disabled travellers –
who are challenged by existing mobility models
may be able to enjoy significantly greater travel autonomy

difficult_points: those who ... 指一类人，who 从句说明他们受现有出行方式限制。
破折号中的 such as older or disabled travellers 是举例说明 those。
may be able to 表示可能具备某种能力，不是确定结果。

sentences.sentence: Beyond these direct benefits, we can consider the wider implications for transport and society, and how manufacturing processes might need to respond as a result.
sentences.translation: 除了这些直接好处之外，我们还可以考虑其对交通和社会的更广泛影响，以及制造流程可能需要如何作出回应。

structure.text: Beyond these direct benefits
we
can consider the wider implications for transport and society
and how manufacturing processes might need to respond as a result

difficult_points: Beyond these direct benefits 表示讨论从直接好处扩展到更宽层面。
the wider implications for transport and society 是 consider 的宾语之一。
how 引导名词性从句，与 implications 并列作 consider 的内容。

sentences.sentence: At present, the average car spends more than 90 percent of its life parked.
sentences.translation: 目前，普通汽车超过90%的使用寿命都处于停放状态。

structure.text: At present
the average car
spends more than 90 percent of its life parked

difficult_points: the average car 指一般意义上的普通汽车。
spends ... parked 是“spend + 时间 + 状态”结构，parked 表示处于停放状态。
more than 90 percent of its life 强调车辆闲置时间很高。

expressions.meaning_zh: 普通汽车；平均意义上的汽车

sentences.sentence: Automation means that initiatives for car-sharing become much more viable, particularly in urban areas with significant travel demand.
sentences.translation: 自动化意味着汽车共享倡议会变得可行得多，尤其是在出行需求很大的城市地区。

structure.text: Automation
means
that initiatives for car-sharing become much more viable, particularly in urban areas with significant travel demand

difficult_points: that 引导 means 的宾语从句，说明自动化带来的结果。
initiatives for car-sharing 指推动汽车共享的项目或方案。
particularly in urban areas ... 是补充状语，强调可行性更高的场景。

sentences.sentence: If a significant proportion of the population choose to use shared automated vehicles, mobility demand can be met by far fewer vehicles.
sentences.translation: 如果相当一部分人口选择使用共享自动化车辆，那么出行需求可以由少得多的车辆来满足。

structure.text: If a significant proportion of the population choose to use shared automated vehicles
mobility demand
can be met by far fewer vehicles

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，说明减少车辆需求的条件。
a significant proportion of the population 表示人口中相当大的比例。
can be met by far fewer vehicles 是被动结构，far 修饰 fewer 加强程度。

sentences.sentence: The Massachusetts Institute of Technology investigated automated mobility in Singapore, finding that fewer than 30 percent of the vehicles currently used would be required if fully automated car sharing could be implemented.
sentences.translation: 麻省理工学院研究了新加坡的自动化出行，发现如果完全自动化的汽车共享能够实施，所需车辆将少于目前使用车辆的30%。

structure.text: The Massachusetts Institute of Technology
investigated automated mobility in Singapore
finding that fewer than 30 percent of the vehicles currently used would be required if fully automated car sharing could be implemented
if fully automated car sharing could be implemented

difficult_points: finding ... 是现在分词短语，补充研究发现。
fewer than 30 percent of the vehicles currently used 是 finding 后 that 从句的主语。
if fully automated car sharing could be implemented 表示该发现成立的条件。

sentences.sentence: If this is the case, it might mean that we need to manufacture far fewer vehicles to meet demand.
sentences.translation: 如果情况确实如此，这可能意味着我们需要制造少得多的车辆来满足需求。

structure.text: If this is the case
it might mean
that we need to manufacture far fewer vehicles to meet demand

difficult_points: this 指上一句研究中车辆需求大幅减少的情况。
might mean 表示谨慎推断，并非绝对结论。
to meet demand 表目的，说明制造车辆的用途。

sentences.sentence: However, the number of trips being taken would probably increase, partly because empty vehicles would have to be moved from one customer to the next.
sentences.translation: 然而，出行次数可能会增加，部分原因是空车必须从一位客户处移动到下一位客户处。

structure.text: the number of trips being taken
would probably increase
partly because empty vehicles would have to be moved from one customer to the next

difficult_points: However 标记与“车辆数量减少”的推断形成转折。
being taken 是现在分词被动短语，修饰 trips。
empty vehicles would have to be moved 是被动结构，说明空车调度会增加行程。

expressions.text: from one customer to the next
expressions.meaning_zh: 从一个客户到下一个客户

sentences.sentence: Modelling work by the University of Michigan Transportation Research Institute suggests automated vehicles might reduce vehicle ownership by 43 percent, but that vehicles' average annual mileage would double as a result.
sentences.translation: 密歇根大学交通研究所的建模工作表明，自动化车辆可能使车辆拥有量减少43%，但车辆的平均年行驶里程会因此翻倍。

structure.text: Modelling work by the University of Michigan Transportation Research Institute
suggests automated vehicles might reduce vehicle ownership by 43 percent
but that vehicles' average annual mileage would double as a result

difficult_points: suggests 后第一个宾语从句省略 that，第二个从句用 but that 引出对比结果。
by 43 percent 表示减少的幅度。
vehicles' average annual mileage 中 vehicles' 是所有格，修饰 mileage。

sentences.sentence: As a consequence, each vehicle would be used more intensively, and might need replacing sooner.
sentences.translation: 因此，每辆车会被更高强度地使用，并且可能需要更早更换。

structure.text: As a consequence
each vehicle
would be used more intensively
and might need replacing sooner

difficult_points: As a consequence 表示前文里程翻倍带来的结果。
would be used 是被动结构，强调车辆被使用的强度。
need replacing 使用 need doing 结构，表示需要被更换。

sentences.sentence: This faster rate of turnover may mean that vehicle production will not necessarily decrease.
sentences.translation: 这种更快的周转速度可能意味着车辆产量并不一定会下降。

structure.text: This faster rate of turnover
may mean
that vehicle production will not necessarily decrease

difficult_points: This faster rate of turnover 指车辆更快被替换的速度。
may mean 表示推测，保留不确定性。
not necessarily decrease 表示“不一定下降”，避免误解为一定不下降。

sentences.sentence: Automation may prompt other changes in vehicle manufacture.
sentences.translation: 自动化可能会促使车辆制造发生其他变化。

structure.text: Automation
may prompt other changes in vehicle manufacture

difficult_points: may 表示可能性，说明作者提出的是趋势判断。
prompt 表示促成或引发，后接 changes。
in vehicle manufacture 限定变化发生的领域。

sentences.sentence: If we move to a model where consumers are tending not to own a single vehicle but to purchase access to a range of vehicles through a mobility provider, drivers will have the freedom to select one that best suits their needs for a particular journey, rather than making a compromise across all their requirements.
sentences.translation: 如果我们转向一种模式，即消费者倾向于不拥有单一车辆，而是通过出行服务提供商购买使用一系列车辆的权限，那么驾驶者将有自由选择最适合某次特定旅程需求的车辆，而不是在所有需求之间作出折中。

structure.text: If we move to a model where consumers are tending not to own a single vehicle but to purchase access to a range of vehicles through a mobility provider
where consumers are tending not to own a single vehicle but to purchase access to a range of vehicles through a mobility provider
drivers
will have the freedom to select one that best suits their needs for a particular journey

difficult_points: If 从句内部含 where 定语从句，说明 model 的具体模式。
not to own ... but to purchase ... 构成对比，说明消费方式从拥有转向购买使用权。
one 指 a vehicle，that best suits ... 是定语从句修饰 one。
rather than making ... 表示选择合适车辆而不是整体折中。

sentences.sentence: Since, for most of the time, most of the seats in most cars are unoccupied, this may boost production of a smaller, more efficient range of vehicles that suit the needs of individuals.
sentences.translation: 由于大多数时候，大多数汽车里的大多数座位都是空的，这可能会推动生产一系列更小、更高效、更适合个人需求的车辆。

structure.text: Since, for most of the time, most of the seats in most cars are unoccupied
this
may boost production of a smaller, more efficient range of vehicles that suit the needs of individuals
that suit the needs of individuals

difficult_points: Since 引导原因状语从句，说明小型高效车辆生产增加的原因。
for most of the time 是插入状语，放在 Since 后面。
that suit the needs of individuals 修饰 vehicles，说明车辆设计更面向个人需求。

sentences.sentence: Specialised vehicles may then be available for exceptional journeys, such as going on a family camping trip or helping a son or daughter move to university.
sentences.translation: 于是，专门化车辆可能会用于特殊旅程，例如全家去露营，或帮助儿子或女儿搬去大学。

structure.text: Specialised vehicles
may then be available for exceptional journeys
such as going on a family camping trip or helping a son or daughter move to university

difficult_points: may then 表示在前述模式下可能出现的后续结果。
be available for 表示可用于某种用途。
such as 后面两个动名词短语并列，举例说明 exceptional journeys。

sentences.sentence: There are a number of hurdles to overcome in delivering automated vehicles to our roads.
sentences.translation: 要把自动化车辆送上我们的道路，还需要克服许多障碍。

structure.text: There are a number of hurdles
to overcome
in delivering automated vehicles to our roads

difficult_points: There are 引出存在句，a number of 表示“许多”。
to overcome 后置修饰 hurdles，说明这些障碍需要被克服。
in delivering ... 表示在实现自动化车辆上路这一过程中。

sentences.sentence: These include the technical difficulties in ensuring that the vehicle works reliably in the infinite range of traffic, weather and road situations it might encounter; the regulatory challenges in understanding how liability and enforcement might change when drivers are no longer essential for vehicle operation; and the societal changes that may be required for communities to trust and accept automated vehicles as being a valuable part of the mobility landscape.
sentences.translation: 这些障碍包括：确保车辆在可能遇到的无限多样的交通、天气和道路情境中可靠运行的技术困难；理解当驾驶员不再是车辆运行所必需时责任和执法可能如何变化的监管挑战；以及为了让社区信任并接受自动化车辆作为出行格局中有价值的一部分而可能需要的社会变化。

structure.text: These
include the technical difficulties in ensuring that the vehicle works reliably in the infinite range of traffic, weather and road situations it might encounter
the regulatory challenges in understanding how liability and enforcement might change when drivers are no longer essential for vehicle operation
and the societal changes that may be required for communities to trust and accept automated vehicles as being a valuable part of the mobility landscape

difficult_points: These 指上一句中的 hurdles，include 后列出三大类障碍。
三个并列宾语由分号分隔：technical difficulties、regulatory challenges 和 societal changes。
that the vehicle works reliably 是 ensuring 的宾语从句。
how liability and enforcement might change 是 understanding 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: It's clear that there are many challenges that need to be addressed but, through robust and targeted research, these can most probably be conquered within the next 10 years.
sentences.translation: 很明显，有许多挑战需要解决；但通过扎实且有针对性的研究，这些挑战很可能在未来10年内被攻克。

structure.text: It's clear
that there are many challenges that need to be addressed
through robust and targeted research
these can most probably be conquered within the next 10 years

difficult_points: It's clear that ... 中 It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正内容。
that need to be addressed 是定语从句，修饰 challenges。
these 指前半句中的 many challenges。
can ... be conquered 是被动结构，表示挑战可被攻克。

expressions.meaning_zh: 扎实且有针对性的研究

sentences.sentence: Mobility will change in such potentially significant ways and in association with so many other technological developments, such as telepresence and virtual reality, that it is hard to make concrete predictions about the future.
sentences.translation: 出行方式将以潜在重大方式发生变化，并且会与远程呈现、虚拟现实等许多其他技术发展相关联，以至于很难对未来作出具体预测。

structure.text: Mobility
will change in such potentially significant ways and in association with so many other technological developments
such as telepresence and virtual reality
that it is hard to make concrete predictions about the future

difficult_points: such ... that ... 构成结果结构，说明变化复杂到难以预测。
in association with 表示与其他技术发展相互关联。
it is hard to ... 中 it 是形式主语，真正内容是 to make concrete predictions。

sentences.sentence: However, one thing is certain: change is coming, and the need to be flexible in response to this will be vital for those involved in manufacturing the vehicles that will deliver future mobility.
sentences.translation: 然而，有一点是确定的：变化即将到来，而对于那些参与制造将承载未来出行的车辆的人来说，灵活应对这种变化的需要将至关重要。

structure.text: one thing
is certain
change is coming
and the need to be flexible in response to this will be vital for those involved in manufacturing the vehicles that will deliver future mobility

difficult_points: 冒号后 change is coming 解释 one thing is certain 的内容。
the need to be flexible in response to this 是后一分句的主语。
those involved in manufacturing ... 中 involved 是过去分词，修饰 those。
that will deliver future mobility 是定语从句，修饰 vehicles。
